scripts.deploy: wrangler deploy --outdir dist --upload-source-maps --var SENTRY_RELEASE:$(sentry-cli releases propose-version)
scripts.sentry:sourcemaps: _SENTRY_RELEASE=$(sentry-cli releases propose-version) && sentry-cli releases new $_SENTRY_RELEASE --org=knuckles --project=rear-jackman && sentry-cli sourcemaps upload --org=knuckles --project=rear-jackman --release=$_SENTRY_RELEASE --strip-prefix dist/.. dist
